data.content:
Handoff for c30f after planning:
Claimed state was `planning`; no source edits were made. The likely bug is that Codex JSON-RPC filters out `mcpServer/elicitation/request` in `src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts`, while history rendering summarizes raw persisted response lines separately in `src/components/agent-history-utils.tsx`. Implement a shared approval visibility helper, wire Codex `mcpServer/elicitation/request` and Gemini `session/request_permission`, make Claude/Copilot `AskUserQuestion` loud, explicitly cover/document OpenCode, and test both live terminal `pushEvent` output and persisted history console rendering. Use `FOOLERY APPROVAL REQUIRED` and include the Playwright fixture details: `serverName=playwright`, tool `browser_evaluate`, message `Allow the playwright MCP server to run tool "browser_evaluate"?`, plus params/tool_params_display. Next implementation should happen in a dedicated worktree with `bun install --frozen-lockfile`, then targeted tests and full gates.
